items.title: Pacers officially waived Micah Potter.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers officially waived Micah Potter.

He appeared in 47 games last season with the Pacers — his first standard NBA deal — after being signed on Dec. 26 following the G League Winter Showcase.

items.title: Exercising the team option for Micah Potter was an easy call for the Pacers — and mostly a formality.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Exercising the team option for Micah Potter was an easy call for the Pacers — and mostly a formality.

His contract is non-guaranteed, preserving flexibility. It doesn’t become guaranteed until Jan. 10, giving the FO time (and an option) to solidify its backup center plan.
